title: Phase 7A Handoff Capsule and Codex Launch Card core
summary: Synthetic reviewable transfer packet for preparing a bounded Codex implementation slice without sending, launching, executing, posting, merging, publishing, or mutating state.
thesis: Handoff Capsule and Codex Launch Card can preserve GuideBrief context as portable preparation packets while denying execution, write, external-call, and handoff-send authority.

observed_context.summary: Phase 6E completed GuideBrief Codex alignment as docs, skill guidance, smoke, package pointer, and latest-index pointer only.
notes: This is read-model context only, not source-of-truth state.

observed_context.summary: GuideBrief and handoff-related contracts require explicit authority boundaries that deny writes, execution, external calls, proof/evidence writes, handoff send, and merge/publish behavior.
notes: Observed from authority and capsule contracts.
Authority boundary copy does not grant authority.

inferred_context.summary: A deterministic type/helper/fixture/smoke slice is sufficient for Phase 7A because route, UI, MCP/App, and execution paths are explicitly deferred.
caveats: This is derived implementation framing, not a source-backed fact.
Future route or UI behavior requires a separate scoped prompt.
non_authority_notes: Inference has no send, launch, execute, approve, merge, publish, proof, evidence, or state authority.

suggested_context.title: Build the core packet contract
suggested_context.summary: Add HandoffCapsule and CodexLaunchCard types, pure builders, public-safe fixtures, and static smoke coverage.
suggested_context.authority_boundary_summary: Suggestion only; active operator prompt is required before Codex implements anything.

suggested_context.title: Defer route, UI, MCP/App, and execution surfaces
suggested_context.summary: Keep Phase 7A to core packet contract and deterministic helpers only.
suggested_context.authority_boundary_summary: Future-surface suggestion only; no execution, route, UI, or App/MCP authority.

needs_user_judgment.question: Which future surface should consume the Handoff Capsule first after Phase 7A lands?
needs_user_judgment.why_it_matters: A route, UI preview, ChatGPT App/MCP tool, or Codex skill alignment would each require different authority boundaries and validation.
options: Add a GET-only read route in a separately scoped phase.
Add a read-only UI preview in a separately scoped phase.
Add ChatGPT App/MCP read-only tooling in a separately scoped phase.
Add Codex skill alignment in a separately scoped phase.

allowed_change_scope: Phase 7A core contract, types, pure helper, fixtures, smoke, package pointer, and latest-index pointer only.

No route, UI, MCP/App tool, DB schema/migration, provider/OpenAI call, GitHub actuation, Codex execution, proof/evidence write, memory mutation, durable Perspective apply, product-write, scheduler/autonomy, handoff send, branch/PR creation from product code, merge, publish, retry, replay, deploy, or external side effect.
boundary_notes: Handoff Capsule is not handoff send.
Codex Launch Card is not Codex execution.
User/operator judgment remains unresolved unless explicitly decided outside the packet.
skipped_check_policy: Do not claim skipped checks passed.
non_goals: No GitHub actuation from Augnes product code.
No Codex execution from Augnes product code.

forbidden_actions: Do not create branches or PRs from Augnes product code.
Do not call GitHub from Augnes product code.
Do not call providers or OpenAI.
Do not write proof or evidence.
Do not apply durable Perspective state.
Do not add scheduler or autonomy runner behavior.
Do not merge, publish, retry, replay, or deploy.
expected_inputs: Explicit target surface and target actor.
Active operator/user prompt for any future implementation.
expected_outputs: No sent handoff and no execution side effect.

optional_checks: Phase 1-6 smoke suite when validating adjacent compatibility.
skipped_check_policy: Do not claim skipped checks passed.
success_criteria: Authority boundary denies all write, execution, external call, send, and launch authority.

warnings: Fixture is synthetic and must not be presented as live runtime state.
Future execution-scoped work must refresh source refs or rely on an active operator prompt.
staleness.refresh_suggestion: Refresh GuideBrief and source refs before any future route, UI, MCP/App, or execution-scoped phase.

notes: Launch Card is reviewable preparation only.
User/operator prompt is required before any future execution path.

target_rendering.compact_summary: Render for codex_handoff as reviewable preparation only.
notes: Show unresolved judgment separately from decisions.
Do not render send, launch, execute, post, merge, publish, or mutate controls.

gaps.summary: Route, UI, MCP/App, and Codex skill alignment are deferred to separately scoped future phases.

next_phase_notes: Phase 7A adds Handoff Capsule and Codex Launch Card core only.
Phase 7B can choose one read-only consumer surface only after explicit operator scope.
Phase 8 Autonomy Contract can consume the card/capsule only as preview input, not execution authority.
